title: Tower T20043GRP Belle 2-Slice Toaster with 7 Browning Settings, Defrost/Reheat/Cancel, 800 W, Graphite
features: BELLE COLLECTION: Enchanting curves, bold colouring and stainless steel highlights add a touch of elegance to your kitchen. This toaster is part of Tower Belle collection, featuring modern kitchenware with Parisian-style designs
7 BROWNING LEVELS: Select from 7 different browning settings to create the perfect piece of toast with your preferred colour and consistency
DEFROST AND REHEAT: Additional settings allow you to toast straight from frozen for a fast breakfast solution or conveniently reheat cold snacks
BUN WARMER RACK: Comes with a bun warmer accessory to enjoy warm sandwiches, croissants and other toasted snacks
3-YEAR WARRANTY: Comes with a standard 1 year guarantee, extending by an additional 2 years after registering the product online
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products Enjoy your toast exactly how you like it with the Belle toaster from Tower The self-centring function and variable browning controls ensure bread, crumpets and muffins are toasted to your preferred texture and colour. Defrost and reheat settings allow you to toast from frozen or reheat cold food back up before serving. It also comes with a bun warming rack accessory to warm up sandwiches, croissants and other toasted snacks. A removable crumb tray provides quick and easy cleaning, while the integrated cord storage keeps your surfaces neatly presented. Enjoy your toast exactly how you like it with browning control settings Defrost and reheat settings with indicator lights for extra convenience Included bun warmer is ideal for warming up a range of snacks including sandwiches and croissants Each slot features a self-centring function for even toasting Removable crumb tray for less mess Integrated cord storage for tidy worktops Anti-slip feet to keep your toaster stable on your work surface
